subcodes.first_line: O Leaf that hath sprung forth from the Tree of Faithfulness! Hearken thou unto that which the Lord of creation doth recount unto thee, even as He hath made mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها الورقه المنبته فی سدره الوفاء ان استمعی ما یذکرک مولی الوری کما ذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for protection, @martyrs and martyrdom
